## Choosing a PR template

GitHub does not auto-select named templates. Append `?template=<filename>` to the PR URL
to load the right one:

| Branch type | Template URL parameter |
|---|---|
| `feat/` `fix/` `design/` `data/` `chore/` | `?template=code_change.md` |
| `docs/` | `?template=docs_update.md` |

If you opened this PR without a template, copy the checklist from the appropriate file in
`.github/PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE/` and paste it here.
